evals.prompt: Add a countdown timer widget to the home page that counts down to the end of the workday.
evals.expected_output: A markdown implementation plan file covering all relevant architectural layers with specific files to create, ViewModel bindings, Application layer use cases, and implementation order.

evals.prompt: When a task is marked complete, I want to record the completion timestamp and show it in the task detail view.
evals.expected_output: A markdown implementation plan file covering Domain model changes, a Command to persist the timestamp, a Query to fetch it, and Presentation layer changes to display it.

evals.prompt: Add a button on the task list page to export all tasks as a CSV file.
evals.expected_output: A markdown implementation plan file that includes a Contracts interface for file system access, an Application layer Command, and Presentation layer changes.
